name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.13.3: bumps ooxml-swift to v0.19.3 — closes 8 P0 + 3 must-fix P1 from #56 round 2 verify (no source changes). Batch A Hyperlink (P0-1 API path styling restored, P0-2 tgtFrame/docLocation Reader filter fixed, P0-3 ordered HyperlinkChild preserves source child order, P1-7 unique Hyperlink.id across duplicate r:id). Batch B Sort path (P0-4 contentControls emit, P0-5 commentIds/footnoteIds/endnoteIds/hasPageBreak emit, P0-8 hyperlink-only paragraph routing). Batch C Revision (P0-6 wrapper preserved for non-text content, P0-7 nested hyperlink/SDT/fieldSimple captured verbatim). Batch D Bookmark (P1-1 nextBookmarkId calibrated from source, P1-4 API-built paragraph bookmark wrap-around restored). v3.13.2: F1-F4 round 1 verify hot-fix. v3.13.1: pPr double-emission hot-fix. v3.13.0: document.xml lossless round-trip (closes #56, P0). v3.12.0: Programmatic Track Changes generation (#45). v3.11.0: Tables / Hyperlinks / Headers (#49 #50 #51). v3.10.0: Styles + Numbering + Sections (#46 #47 #48). v3.9.0: Content Controls (SDT) read/write (#44).
